current_strategy_code:
import pandas as pd
from crabquant.indicator_cache import cached_indicator

DEFAULT_PARAMS = {
    "rsi_long": 28,
    "rsi_short": 7,
    "regime_threshold": 55,
    "dip_level": 30,
    "ema_len": 50,
    "rsi_exit": 72,
}

DESCRIPTION = (
    "RSI regime dip with EMA trend filter. Long RSI confirms bullish regime, "
    "short RSI times pullback recovery entries. EMA ensures directional alignment. "
    "Exits on RSI overbought or EMA trend break."
)


def generate_signals(df: pd.DataFrame, params: dict | None = None) -> tuple[pd.Series, pd.Series]:
    p = {**DEFAULT_PARAMS, **(params or {})}
    close = df["close"]

    rsi_long = cached_indicator("rsi", close, length=p["rsi_long"])
    rsi_short = cached_indicator("rsi", close, length=p["rsi_short"])
    ema = cached_indicator("ema", close, length=p["ema_len"])

    bullish_regime = rsi_long > p["regime_threshold"]
    trend_ok = close > ema
    dip_recovery = (rsi_short.shift(1) < p["dip_level"]) & (rsi_short >= p["dip_level"])

    entries = (bullish_regime & trend_ok & dip_recovery).fillna(False)
    exits = ((rsi_short > p["rsi_exit"]) | (close < ema)).fillna(False)

    return entries, exits

previous_attempts.hypothesis: MSFT exhibits sustained trend moves where momentum acceleration (MACD histogram turning positive) combined with RSI pullback timing avoids buying at tops. The EMA trend filter ensures we only trade in the dominant direction, while volume confirmation validates institutional participation. This confluence should capture MSFT's characteristic trend accelerations while the histogram-based exits provide timely risk management to stay under 22% drawdown.

The original strategy is far too selective with 4 simultaneous conditions (EMA trend + MACD zero-cross + RSI filter + volume filter), yielding only 3 trades. The volume filter is the biggest culprit — requiring above-average volume on the exact day MACD crosses zero is extremely rare. The fix: remove volume and RSI filters entirely, and expand MACD entry to include histogram strengthening above zero (not just zero crosses), matching the proven macd_momentum template that achieved Sharpe 2.15+. Also switch from zero-cross exit to threshold-based exit to exit earlier on momentum decay rather than waiting for full reversal.
